goal: norm_distance(x + z, y + z) = (x + z - (y + z)).norm

p.c: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 - x1).norm = norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) }[G](x + z, y + z)

goal: x + z - (y + z) = x + z + -(y + z)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[G](x + z, y + z)

goal: norm_open_ball(x + z, r).contains(y + z) = norm_distance(y + z, x + z) < r

p.c: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: Real) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) < x2 = x0 ∈ norm_open_ball[T0](x1, x2) }[G](y + z, x + z, r)

goal: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) = norm_distance(y, x)
norm_closed_ball(x + z, r).contains(y + z) = norm_distance(y + z, x + z) <= r

p.c: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: Real, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ norm_closed_ball[T0](x0, x1) = norm_distance[T0](x2, x0) <= x1 }[G](x + z, r, y + z)

goal: norm_distance(y + z, x + z) = norm_distance(y, x)
